ideation: This sequence aims to visually represent the hazy, mysterious nature of fog.  The animation will show both arms slowly rising and falling, mimicking the gentle, undulating movement of fog. The arms will remain mostly straight, creating a sense of stillness and mystery. The wrists will have slight inward and outward rotations to add to the mysterious and ethereal quality of the fog.  The movements will be slow and deliberate, creating a calming and reflective atmosphere. In the first frame, both arms will start in a neutral position, slightly below shoulder height.  In the second frame, both arms will rise slightly, with a subtle inward wrist rotation, adding to the ethereal quality. In the third frame, the arms will begin to fall back down, with a slight outward wrist rotation. In the fourth frame, the arms will almost reach the starting position. In the fifth frame, the arms will return to the neutral position, but with a barely perceptible shift in the wrist rotation.

frames.beat: arms hang low, still as the air
arms gently lift, wrists twist inward mysteriously
arms descend, wrists rotate outward softly
arms almost settle, a slow, hazy drift
arms rest, a subtle shift in the mist
